productDisplayName: Nike Unisex Ultimatum Max Black Backpacks
description: Fun, style, and comfort are the highlights of this tough black nike Ultimatum Max Air Utility backpack. Carry it to college, office, or a casual day out with your friends. A good looking bag, with lots of space, it will accomodate everything you can think of, while you strut around looking super funky!MeasurementHeight: 47 cmWidth: 40 cmDepth: 17 cmCapacity: 21 litresMade of 32% polyester and 68% nylon for enhanced durability and styleNylon lining for increased durabilityTwo main zippered compartments to accomodate all your useful itemsOne compartment with a separate laptop enclosureSecond compartment with a detailed organizer for storing essentialsBrand badge on the frontMesh pockets on sides to hold bottlesExterior media-player zip pocket at left top to keep your player secure and protectedAdjustable shoulders straps with lightweight yet durable nike Max Air technology to absorb shock and cushion the shoulder, distributing loads more evenlyVentilated and molded back panel for breathability and comfortHaul loop for handling easeBranding on strapsBranded zippers and sliders for easy useCareDo not machine washRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
